'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/UKThreatLevel\/UKThreatLevel.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=qExogx_NZg72j3BLbDRBe7R_ElTzmDS.JPZfT6p54Cs-1772774069-1.0.1.1-mdlHpO5PtdVfZgaW9GBCABrhlsbEqVNVaThu6khUSmQ"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
